_comment: Chess Tournament Entry Prediction — Tournament Configuration
_instructions: Add one entry per tournament. 'prior_params' can be null if you want the system to fit from scratch.

settings._alert_note: Set alert credentials in .env (SENDGRID_API_KEY, TWILIO_*). Email/SMS fire automatically when delta exceeds threshold.

tournaments.name: World Open 2026
tournaments._sections_note: If this tournament has multiple sections listed separately on chessaction.com, add a 'sections' array below. Each section needs a label and registration_url. The pipeline will scrape all sections and sum entry counts.

prior_params.source: CCA brief pre-fitted parameters (20 data points as of 2026-03-09)

t_calibration._note: t is not in simple calendar days — calibrated from brief milestone predictions

tournaments.name: Chicago Open 2022
tournaments._note: Historical training dataset. 943 entries, Jan 7 – May 29 2022. Double sigmoid (early bird).

tournaments.name: North American Open 2024
tournaments._note: Historical training dataset. 1102 entries, Jul 12 – Dec 27 2024. Single sigmoid (no early bird).
